name: Route on verification
notes: Calc-route-after-action junction (see SCHEMA.md § Common Flow Compositions). No scripts, no captures — its only job is to branch on the policy_active output that cap_verify_policy bound during the transition into this flow. Both exits are calculation-routed and short-circuit before any LLM call, so the runner passes through without producing an agent turn.

exit_paths.notes: Covers both False (verified-but-inactive) and undefined (verify_policy failed or never bound). Lets flow_policy_not_found handle both with a single branch.
